description.div: A wooden, unpained plank. The four characters are painted with black ink in a nice and regular hand writing from right to left.
The inner space contains an altar at the back side and contains the old honglu on the right side.

text.translation: The generals protect the five realms of the auspicious land.

trans.div: Will protect the auspicious land and prestige the five realms

description.div: A wooden, unpained plank, nailed to the right wall of the little shrine. The seven characters are painted with black ink in a nice and regular hand writing.

text.translation: Gardians of peace oversee the directions of the site.

description.div: A wooden, unpained plank, nailed to the left wall of the little shrine. The seven characters are painted with black ink in a nice and regular hand writing.
The structure is built using bricks and cement. The altar and the inner back wall are painted red, the inner left and right wall are painted white.

The five generals of the Linglian temple are unitied in a small shrine, not higher than a meter, which like the temple is facing the sea. While the Linglian temple is turned slightly southwest, the little shrine of the five generals is facing straight south. The generals are, from right to left, Xiao, Zhang, Li, Lian and Liu.

names.name: Chaoyang Linglian Tang
Chaoyang Linglian Tang Natuo San Taizi
Linglian Tang
朝陽靈蓮堂
朝陽靈蓮堂哪吒三太子

description.div: The Chaoyang Linglian Tang is a relatively small and modest temple, facing the sea, but now separated from the water by a dike. The temple is surrounded by inner generals which haven\'t been renewed for years. The five generals are gathered in front to the temple and face slightly more south than the temple itself. On the premises of the temple there are toilets, there is a small hexagonal lotus pond, with the eight trigrams of a bagua.
The inner room of the Chaoyang Linglian Tang contains the flags of the five generals and colored lingpai of three generals, General Li, yellow, General Xiao, red and General Zhang, turquoise.
The temple announces activities through a facebook group. The QR-code is shown beside the entrance to the temple.
The temple is built using iron sheets.

names.name: 朝陽武聖殿的拜鐘
Temple Bell of Chaoyang Wusheng Dian
朝陽武聖殿的拜鐘
Temple Bell of Chaoyang Wusheng Dian
朝陽東甲北極殿五營
Magong Dongjia Beiji Dian Wu Ying
Magong Dongjia Beiji Dian Five Generals
Chaoyang Dongjia Beiji Dian Five Generals
